page_metadata.biotools__summary: Allows the user to compress Molecular Dynamics (MD) trajectories using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) algorithms. This technique offers a good compression ratio at the expense of losing some precision in the trajectory.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Allows the user to compress Molecular Dynamics (MD) trajectories using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) algorithms. This technique offers a good compression ratio at the expense of losing some precision in the trajectory.
